function: () => { const dot = document.querySelector('[data-cursor-dot]'); dot.style.transform = 'translate3d(450px, 400px, 0)'; const rect = dot.getBoundingClientRect(); const cx = Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2); const cy = Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2); const elTop = document.elementFromPoint(cx, cy); const all = document.elementsFromPoint(cx, cy).slice(0, 6).map(e => e.tagName + (e.className ? '.' + (typeof e.className === 'string' ? e.className.slice(0, 40) : '') : '') + ' z=' + getComputedStyle(e).zIndex); return { dotRect: { x: rect.x, y: rect.y, w: rect.width, h: rect.height }, dotStyle: { pos: getComputedStyle(dot).position, z: getComputedStyle(dot).zIndex, transform: dot.style.transform }, topElement: elTop ? elTop.tagName + '.' + (typeof elTop.className === 'string' ? elTop.className.slice(0, 40) : '') : null, allElementsAt: all }; }
